title: lavandula × intermedia nothosubsp. intermedia
intro: Lavandula × intermedia nothosubsp. intermedia is a hybrid plant species of lavender, resulting from the cross between Lavandula angustifolia and Lavandula latifolia. This plant is known for its calming and medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues such as anxiety, insomnia, and skin irritations. The lavender oil extracted from Lavandula × intermedia nothosubsp. intermedia has been used in herbal preparations to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve sleep quality, as well as to soothe burns and wounds. In herbal medicine, Lavandula × intermedia nothosubsp. intermedia is often used to prepare teas, essential oils, and topical creams to harness its therapeutic benefits.
